front: Artist: illustrated Blaise Cendrars's Prose of the Trans-Siberian
work: Prose of the Trans-Siberian and of Little Jehanne of France (1913, with Blaise Cendrars)

front: Artist: the first "simultaneous book" with multicolored paintings alongside poetry

front: Artist: published enough copies of an illustrated Cendrars poem that they could be stacked to reach the height of the Eiffel Tower

front: Artist: created "dress-poems" embroidered with avant-garde poetry by Vicente Huidobro and Tristan Tzara

Artist: designed cardboard trapezoid costumes for Tristan Tzara's The Gas Heart; actors couldn't escape a riot
